headline: A Look At Newmont (NEM) Valuation As Shares Trade Near Estimated Fair Value
summary: What the latest figures say about Newmont (NEM) Newmont (NEM) has drawn fresh attention as investors reassess its recent performance, with the stock up 1.2% over the past day, roughly flat over the past month, and down 8.3% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Newmont. Zooming out, Newmont’s share price has gained 8.2% year to date, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 100.0% and 3 year total shareholder return of 178.6% reflect recent performance.
